summary: Rewrote charge-calendar to read the real /delivery/summary (scheduled deliveryDate) and /delivery/v2/calendar (allowed reschedule window) shapes.
reason: The generated stub assumed /delivery/v2/calendar returns a delivery array; the live API returns a date-picker config (allowed range + disabled days) and the scheduled delivery lives in /delivery/summary. Live dogfood confirmed charge=-7d and lock=-5d reconcile with the API's own message.
validated_outcome: Live: next_delivery 2026-06-23, charge 2026-06-16, lock 2026-06-18 matches API message; unit tests pass.
